startPoint.en: Talk to Veldaban on the top floor of Keldagrim Palace.
startPoint.es: Habla con Veldaban en la planta superior del Keldagrim Palace.

children.title: Forgettable Tale of a Drunken Dwarf
Rescue Mad Eadgar from the Troll Stronghold area

recommended.name: Watchtower Teleport
recommended.display: Watchtower Teleport runes, Watchtower teleport (item) tablet or Yanille lodestone (if Watchtower spell isn't unlocked)

rewards.name: Rune bar
rewards.display: 30 each of rune, adamant, and mithril bars

rewards.name: Chaos Giant
rewards.display: Ability to fight Chaos Giants in Barendir

children.name: Dragon throwing axe
children.display: Main and off-hand dragon throwing axes, dropped by Chaos Giants

children.name: Dragon battlestaff
children.display: Dragon battlestaff, sold in the Quality Weapons Shop

children.name: Dragon warhammer
children.display: Main and off-hand dragon warhammers, sold in Vigr's Warhammers shop

rewards.name: Lava geyser
rewards.display: Access to the lava geyser in the Lava Flow Mine, which has a chance to reward fragments of the Imcando pickaxe

rewards.name: Chaos Theory (music track)
rewards.display: Chaos Theory, in the Red Axe base's palace

rewards.name: Memories of Keldagrim
rewards.display: Memories of Keldagrim, in the memories of Keldagrim

rewards.name: Rage of the Red Axe
rewards.display: Rage of the Red Axe, when fighting Grimsson and Hreidmar

rewards.name: Red Axe Retribution
rewards.display: Red Axe Retribution, when assaulting the Red Axe base

postQuest.display: A further 250,000 experience in chunks of 20,000 experience to 33,000 experience, with requirements ranging from level 81 to 95 Mining, when mining the Ancient Keldagrim ruins north of West Keldagrim.

children.name: Boosts will work to mine ruins that are beyond your current level.
children.display: Boosts will work to mine ruins that are beyond your current level.

postQuest.name: Laughing Miner Pub
postQuest.display: If Veldaban survives, the player can offer to use the memory wand to restore his memories of Hilda. He is initially reluctant, afraid of how much he may have made up about her but, if the player encourages him, agrees. He doesn't share his revelations, saying that it's between him and her memory, but thanks the player for doing so. Veldaban can be found in the throne room above the Trade Octagon or in the Laughing Miner Pub on the east side of the city, depending on the player's choice. The wand can be fetched from the Watchtower Wizard if the player destroyed it earlier in the quest.

children.name: It can also be used on the Drunken Dwarf in the north of East Keldagrim regardless of the outcome of the quest. However, it will have no effect on him, as he will celebrate remembering by getting drunk again, thus forgetting again.
children.display: It can also be used on the Drunken Dwarf in the north of East Keldagrim regardless of the outcome of the quest. However, it will have no effect on him, as he will celebrate remembering by getting drunk again, thus forgetting again.

postQuest.name: Wilfred
postQuest.display: Wilfred will now sell the shard of the Lumberjack, a component of the hatchet of ember and glade, for 1,000,000 coins.

text.en: 1 backpack space
text.es: 1 espacio en la mochila

text.en: Talk to King Veldaban on the top floor of Keldagrim Palace.
text.es: Habla con King Veldaban en la planta superior del Keldagrim Palace.

chatOptions: 3 So what are you going to do?

text.en: 2 backpack spaces, Royal dwarven seal
text.es: 2 espacios en la mochila, Royal dwarven seal

text.en: Enter the records chamber cave to the west of the bank (along the west wall).
text.es: Entra en la cueva de la cámara de registros al oeste del banco (junto al muro oeste).

text.en: Talk to Lieutenant Brae.
text.es: Habla con Lieutenant Brae.

chatOptions: 1 He's not coming. He sent me instead.

text.en: Talk to Vigr.
text.es: Habla con Vigr.

text.en: Talk to Brendt.
text.es: Habla con Brendt.

chatOptions: 2 Why did King Sorvott say you were from the Red Axe?

text.en: Talk to Grundt.
text.es: Habla con Grundt.

chatOptions: 3 What was the nickname of your ship's captain?

text.en: Talk to Brendt.
text.es: Habla con Brendt.

chatOptions: 3 Grundt says the ship's captain was Sigridsdottir.

text.en: Talk to Klaas.
text.es: Habla con Klaas.

chatOptions: 1 Calling for the overthrow of the king is treason.
1 How do you know Veldaban isn't the rightful king?
2 I think the Red Axe told you to say this.

text.en: Go to the western 1st floor of the Consortium in the north-eastern room.
text.es: Ve a la 1.ª planta occidental del Consortium, en la sala noreste.

text.en: Talk to Sieglinde.
text.es: Habla con Sieglinde.

chatOptions: 2 I want to search the workshop.

text.en: Right click search the furnace.
text.es: Haz clic derecho para buscar en el horno.

text.en: Read the bundle of letters.
text.es: Lee el fajo de cartas.

text.en: Go to the King's Axe Inn, south of the bank, and talk to Meike.
text.es: Ve al King's Axe Inn, al sur del banco, y habla con Meike.

chatOptions: 1 Klaas is calling for a revolution.
1 Why does Klaas think Veldaban isn't the rightful king?
1 Could he have got the idea from the Red Axe?

text.en: Return to the cave the suspects are in.
text.es: Regresa a la cueva donde están los sospechosos.

text.en: Talk to Vigr.
text.es: Habla con Vigr.

chatOptions: 1 Here are some letters I found in your workshop.

text.en: Talk to Klaas.
text.es: Habla con Klaas.

chatOptions: 1 I spoke to Meike. She vouched for you.

text.en: Don't forget to judge all the dwarves and make sure they are gone. Otherwise you won't find Veldaban in the cave later on.
text.es: No olvides juzgar a todos los dwarves y asegúrate de que se hayan marchado. De lo contrario, no encontrarás a Veldaban en la cueva más adelante.

text.en: Return to King Veldaban.
text.es: Regresa a King Veldaban.

chatOptions: 1 I've dealt with the suspected spies.
1 Vigr said the Red Axe broke off contact with him.

text.en: Combat equipment
text.es: Equipo de combate

text.en: Go to the Taverley Dungeon and kill chaos dwarves (south of the Lesser demons) until Ikadia the Exile appears.
text.es: Ve al Taverley Dungeon y mata chaos dwarves (al sur de los Lesser demons) hasta que aparezca Ikadia the Exile.

text.en: After she talks to you and teleports away, go to the chaos druid circle in the north-eastern corner of the dungeon and talk to her.
text.es: Después de que ella hable contigo y se teletransporte, ve al círculo de chaos druids en la esquina noreste de la mazmorra y habla con ella.

text.en: Defeat her and talk to her again.
text.es: Derrótala y vuelve a hablar con ella.

text.en: No Summoning familiar, 5 backpack spaces
text.es: Sin familiar de Invocación, 5 espacios en la mochila

text.en: Go to the Yanille's Watchtower
text.es: Ve al Yanille's Watchtower.

text.en: Use Watchtower Teleport or Watchtower teleport tablet
text.es: Usa Watchtower Teleport o una Watchtower teleport tablet.

text.en: Alternatively, teleport to Yanille lodestone to Yanille and use the northern shortcuts to go under the north wall (requires 16 Agility) then west outside the northern wall
text.es: Alternativamente, teletranspórtate al lodestone de Yanille y usa los atajos del norte para pasar bajo el muro norte (requiere 16 de Agilidad) y luego dirígete al oeste, fuera del muro norte.

text.en: If you do not have the Watchtower quest completed, Climb-up the Trellis on the northern side of the Watchtower.
text.es: Si no has completado la misión Watchtower, sube por el Trellis en el lado norte del Watchtower.

text.en: Dismiss any Summoning familiar you have, and talk to the Watchtower Wizard on the top floor.
text.es: Despide a cualquier familiar de Invocación que tengas y habla con el Watchtower Wizard en la planta superior.

text.en: You'll be given a memory wand. Keep the wand for the rest of the quest, do not destroy it.
text.es: Recibirás una memory wand. Guarda la varita durante el resto de la misión, no la destruyas.

text.en: Use the wand on the 4 floating objects.
text.es: Usa la varita en los 4 objetos flotantes.

text.en: Catch all the loose memory fragments. There will be 16 fragments total, 4 of each type.
text.es: Recoge todos los fragmentos de memoria sueltos. Habrá 16 fragmentos en total, 4 de cada tipo.

text.en: Investigate each memory void. Based on the text that appears, use the corresponding memory fragment on the memory void following the table below:
text.es: Investiga cada memory void. Según el texto que aparezca, usa el fragmento de memoria correspondiente en el memory void siguiendo la tabla de abajo:

rows.text: Walking stick, spiky hair, twirly moustache.
What would a Gnome be doing here?
I wonder where he got that scar.
It's not natural for a dwarf to look like that.

text.en: After the cutscene, return to King Veldaban.
text.es: Después de la escena cinemática, regresa a King Veldaban.

chatOptions: 1 I got a wand from the Watchtower Wizard.
2 I'll meet you in the Barendir caves.

steps.section: The assault on the Red Axe

text.en: Food, sign of life, run enhancing items, 1 backpack space
text.es: Comida, sign of life, objetos que mejoren la carrera, 1 espacio en la mochila

steps.section: The assault on the Red Axe

text.en: Enter the Barendir caves southeast of west Keldagrim. The caves can be accessed by selecting "Travel" on the Dwarven Boatman on the eastern side of Keldagrim near the northern bridge, or selecting "Cross-river" on the Dwarven Ferryman to the south of western Keldagrim.
text.es: Entra en las Barendir caves al sureste de west Keldagrim. Se puede acceder a las cuevas seleccionando "Travel" en el Dwarven Boatman en el lado este de Keldagrim, cerca del puente norte, o seleccionando "Cross-river" en el Dwarven Ferryman al sur de west Keldagrim.

steps.section: The assault on the Red Axe

text.en: Proceed to the north end of the tunnel and enter the cave at the end.
text.es: Continúa hasta el extremo norte del túnel y entra en la cueva del final.

steps.section: The assault on the Red Axe

text.en: Talk to Veldaban. If Veldaban isn't there, make sure the cave with suspects is empty.
text.es: Habla con Veldaban. Si Veldaban no está allí, asegúrate de que la cueva con los sospechosos esté vacía.

steps.section: The assault on the Red Axe

text.en: Talk to Nulodion. He'll give you explosive gears.
text.es: Habla con Nulodion. Te dará unos explosive gears.

steps.section: The assault on the Red Axe

text.en: Fire the cannon. This part is not a safe death. Should you die, your gravestone will be a short walk inside the Barendir caves.
text.es: Dispara el cañón. Esta parte no es una muerte segura. Si mueres, tu lápida aparecerá a poca distancia dentro de las Barendir caves.

steps.section: The assault on the Red Axe

text.en: After the cutscene, stand behind the pillars to get the cannons to shoot them down, and sabotage the cannons as you progress. The first one is to the west. Do not stand near a cannon if it is about to explode, as it will hit for 5,000+ damage. Praying against range is strongly recommended.
text.es: Después de la escena cinemática, ponte detrás de los pilares para que los cañones les disparen y derríbalos, saboteando los cañones a medida que avanzas. El primero está al oeste. No te quedes cerca de un cañón si está a punto de explotar, ya que puede hacerte más de 5000 de daño. Se recomienda encarecidamente rezar contra distancia.

steps.section: The assault on the Red Axe

text.en: After destroying all 5 cannons, walk up onto the platform with Colonel Grimsson.
text.es: Después de destruir los 5 cañones, sube a la plataforma con Colonel Grimsson.

steps.section: The assault on the Red Axe

text.en: Pull the lever that's on top of the platform above the minecart, then get into the mine cart.
text.es: Tira de la palanca que hay en la parte superior de la plataforma, encima del minecart, y luego súbete al minecart.

text.en: 3 backpack spaces, memory wand
text.es: 3 espacios en la mochila, memory wand

text.en: After getting in the cart, there will be a cutscene and you will end up in another memory.
text.es: Después de subirte al minecart, habrá una escena cinemática y terminarás en otra memoria.

text.en: Use the Memory wand on the royal Red Axe standard (flag, west of Veldaban), the Zamorakian Chaplain, and the chaos dwarf standing next to him.
text.es: Usa la memory wand en el estandarte real de Red Axe (la bandera, al oeste de Veldaban), en el Zamorakian Chaplain y en el chaos dwarf que está a su lado.

text.en: Catch all the loose memory fragments. There will be 9 fragments total, 3 of each type.
text.es: Recoge todos los fragmentos de memoria sueltos. Habrá 9 fragmentos en total, 3 de cada tipo.

text.en: Investigate each memory void. Based on the text that appears, use the corresponding memory fragment on the memory void following the table below:
text.es: Investiga cada memory void. Según el texto que aparezca, usa el fragmento de memoria correspondiente en el memory void siguiendo la tabla de abajo:

rows.text: He doesn't want to be here.
Eight coloured segments on a flag.

text.en: Talk to Veldaban. You will then be put into the next memory.
text.es: Habla con Veldaban. A continuación, serás transportado a la siguiente memoria.

text.en: In the next memory, use the wand on the two trolls directly next to Grimsson (each provide 6 memory fragments) and repeat the memory fragment process following the table below:
text.es: En la siguiente memoria, usa la varita en los dos trolls que están junto a Grimsson (cada uno proporciona 6 fragmentos de memoria) y repite el proceso de los fragmentos de memoria siguiendo la tabla de abajo:

rows.text: He doesn't want to be here.

text.en: Talk to Grimsson (his dialogue won't appear while he's busy fending the trolls).
text.es: Habla con Grimsson (su diálogo no aparecerá mientras esté ocupado defendiéndose de los trolls).

text.en: In the next memory, use the wand on Zamorak and repeat the memory fragment process.
text.es: En la siguiente memoria, usa la varita en Zamorak y repite el proceso de los fragmentos de memoria.

text.en: In the next memory, use the wand on the 3 dwarves, catch the memory fragments only when they're not labelled "dangerous", and repeat the process following the table below:
text.es: En la siguiente memoria, usa la varita en los 3 dwarves, recoge los fragmentos de memoria solo cuando no estén etiquetados como "dangerous", y repite el proceso siguiendo la tabla de abajo:

rows.text: Walking stick, spiky hair, twirly moustache.
I wonder where he got that scar.
What would a gnome be doing here?

text.en: Combat equipment
text.es: Equipo de combate

text.en: Kill Grunsh or let him go.
text.es: Mata a Grunsh o déjalo ir.

text.en: Enter the eastern doorway behind King Veldaban, then enter the palace and go up to the 2nd floor.
text.es: Entra por la puerta este que hay detrás de King Veldaban, luego entra en el palacio y sube a la 2.ª planta.

text.en: Try to open the door with the chaos dwarf behind it.
text.es: Intenta abrir la puerta tras la que se encuentra el chaos dwarf.

text.en: Right click and talk to one of the directors.
text.es: Haz clic derecho y habla con uno de los directors.

chatOptions: 4 My friend here would like to join the Red Axe.

text.en: Kill 7 of the 8 directors.
text.es: Mata a 7 de los 8 directors.

text.en: Talk to the remaining director.
text.es: Habla con el director restante.

text.en: Go upstairs to the top floor of the palace.
text.es: Sube a la planta superior del palacio.

text.en: No follower
text.es: Sin acompañante

text.en: Magic combat equipment and food
text.es: Equipo de combate de Magia y comida

text.en: Talk to Grimsson and begin the fight.
text.es: Habla con Grimsson y comienza el combate.

chatOptions: 3 All right, Grimsson - bring it on.

text.en: Kill Grimsson. If Veldaban dies, you will respawn outside the cave and need to re-enter and try again from the start.
text.es: Mata a Grimsson. Si Veldaban muere, reaparecerás fuera de la cueva y tendrás que volver a entrar e intentarlo de nuevo desde el principio.

text.en: Kill Chaos Grimsson. Try to lure and isolate him on the side with the stairs, just outside the main room. When his adrenaline bar fills up and he's about to charge you, go down the stairs and wait for 10 seconds before coming back up.
text.es: Mata a Chaos Grimsson. Intenta atraerlo y aislarlo en el lado de las escaleras, justo fuera de la sala principal. Cuando su barra de adrenalina se llene y esté a punto de embestirte, baja las escaleras y espera 10 segundos antes de volver a subir.

text.en: Kill Chaos Hreidmar.
text.es: Mata a Chaos Hreidmar.

text.en: Either kill or save Veldaban.
text.es: Mata a Veldaban o sálvalo.

text.en: Speak with any director.
text.es: Habla con cualquier director.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
